1.description: retrieve Drammen municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: retrieve buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones

4.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard zones within Drammen municipality extent

5.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

6.description: aggregate to keep the minimum distance per building

7.description: sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;<MUNICIPALITY_GEOMETRY>'))

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

3.description: get quick-clay hazard zones filtered by municipality geometry

4.description: get buildings in Drammen filtered by kommunenummer

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay

8.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker
